hero.title: Every great trip starts as a group chat.
hero.subtitle: OpenTrip turns the chaos into one shared plan: the route, the days, the money — and an AI co-planner that knows every stop.
hero.trust: Free to start · Includes a 5-day Japan demo trip
hero.imageAlt: OpenTrip desktop map of the five-day Japan demo trip

map.title: The whole trip, on one map.
map.body: Every stop, pinned and numbered. Filter by day, check the forecast, and find that café everyone's been talking about — without leaving the map.
map.imageAlt: Itinerary map with numbered stops and per-day routes

schedule.title: Every day, at a glance.
schedule.body: One column per day — what time, which train, where you're staying. The plan practically reads itself.

budget.title: No more awkward math.
budget.body: Log expenses as they happen. OpenTrip keeps the balance and works out the fewest transfers to settle up — in any currency.
budget.imageAlt: Shared expenses with balances and settle-up transfers

agent.title: An AI that knows your trip.
agent.body: “Can we swap day two and three?” Just ask — it proposes the change, and nothing is final until someone on the crew approves.
agent.imageAlt: Trip agent chat suggesting itinerary changes

collaborate.title: Everyone gets a say.
collaborate.body: Vote on stops, leave comments, share one invite link. The plan stays in sync, so no one has to dig through the group chat.
collaborate.imageAlt: Stop detail with votes, comments, and costs

mobile.title: The trip goes where you go.
mobile.body: Install it as an app, or open it in WeChat — same plan, live in everyone's pocket.

cta.title: Your crew is ready when you are.
cta.subtitle: Sign up and the demo trip is waiting — five days across Japan, already planned.

footer.tagline: Made for people who travel together.
